providers.name: GitHub Pages
providers.description: Free static site hosting directly from a GitHub repository. Supports custom domains and HTTPS.

providers.name: GitLab Pages
providers.description: Free static hosting built into GitLab, with CI/CD integration and custom domain support.

providers.name: Neocities
providers.description: Free static web hosting inspired by the old GeoCities, focused on the indie web and personal sites.

providers.name: Netlify
providers.description: Free tier static hosting with CDN, continuous deployment, form handling, and serverless functions.

providers.name: DOM Cloud
providers.description: Free hosting platform supporting static sites and multiple server-side runtimes.

providers.name: Azure Static Web Apps
providers.description: Free tier static hosting from Microsoft Azure with global CDN and GitHub Actions integration.

providers.name: Aerobatic
providers.description: Commercial static site hosting with advanced routing, redirects, and plugin support.

providers.name: BowTie
providers.description: Commercial static site hosting and build service for Jekyll and other static generators.

providers.name: Divshot
providers.description: Commercial static web hosting with a focus on front-end workflows and CLI deployment.

providers.name: AWS S3
providers.description: Object storage from Amazon Web Services widely used for static site hosting with CloudFront CDN.
